title: Lab 18: Tuned Recommended Profile
description: Apply the system recommended tuned profile

tasks: Apply the recommended tuned profile and leave it active after reboot.
hints: Use tuned-adm recommend to see the target profile.
checks: rec="$(tuned-adm recommend | awk '{print $1}')"; act="$(tuned-adm active | sed -E 's/.*: ([^ ]+).*/\1/')"; test -n "$rec" && test "$act" = "$rec"
task_titles: Apply the recommended tuned profile and leave it...
